data.title: 105 of 107 Economists Expect Fed to Cut Rates 25 Basis Points on September 17: Reuters
data.description:
Nearly unanimous consensus among economists points to a Fed rate cut next week, with 105 of 107 economists expecting a 25 basis-point reduction on September 17, marking the first easing since January, as Bitcoin surged above $116,000 following fresh inflation data with the Producer Price Index declining 0. 1% unexpectedly, while spot Bitcoin ETFs drew $553 million in net inflows.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/105-of-107-economists-expect-fed-to-cut-rates-25-basis-points-on-september-17-reuters/

data.title: TON Strategy Company Executes Stock Buyback and Asset Staking Plan
data.description: According to PANews, TON Strategy Company, listed on Nasdaq as TONX, has announced the repurchase of over 250,000 shares of common stock under its previously disclosed $250 million stock buyback program. The company has also initiated the staking of TON assets, aiming to leverage its treasury holdings for on-chain revenue generation. The average price for the repurchased shares was $8.32 each, while the company's tangible asset value per share stood at $12.181 as of September 11, 2025.

data.title: The giant whale qianbaidu.eth began selling HYPE tokens to cut profits, with an estimated profit of $3.45 million
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin, a whale account (qianbaidu.eth) has begun selling HYPE tokens to cash in profits. This address spent 20.57 million USDC on the 8th to purchase 431,000 HYPE tokens at $47.70. Two hours ago, they began selling them at $56. This investment in HYPE is expected to generate a profit of $3.45 million, a 16% return.

data.description:
Assuming BlackRock receives regulatory approval to do so, what does it mean for Ethereum and other crypto leaders?

data.title: FTX’s Sam Bankman-Fried Files Appeal to U.S Court in a Bid to Reduce 25-Year Sentence
data.description:
Former FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried, currently serving a 25-year prison sentence following his conviction on seven felony charges, has submitted an appeal to the U. S. Court of Appeals for the Second Circuit seeking to reduce his jail term with oral arguments scheduled for November 4, 2025.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/ftxs-sam-bankman-fried-files-appeal-to-u-s-court-in-a-bid-to-reduce-25-year-sentence/

data.title: A whale spent 2.3 million USDC to buy 3 million ENA
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, the whale address "thefourthturning.eth" spent 2.3 million USDC to buy 3 million ENA at $0.766. Its on-chain address is 0xaf297dec752c909092a117a932a8ca4aaaff9795.

data.title: Solana Futures Surge Amid ETF Approval Speculation
data.description: According to PANews, Solana CME futures open interest has surged to $1.87 billion, marking a 25.5% increase from $1.49 billion on September 9. This rise is attributed to the anticipation of a potential approval of a Solana spot ETF in October and the ongoing accumulation by SOL treasury companies, which has heightened demand.

data.title: Ethena-related addresses transferred 44 million ENA to Binance within two weeks
data.description: According to Ember's monitoring, an address associated with the Ethena project or investors transferred 5 million ENA (approximately $3.81 million) to Binance half an hour ago. This address has frequently transferred ENA over the past two weeks, totaling 44 million ENA (approximately $30.56 million) at an average price of approximately $0.69. This address initially received 375 million ENA from an Ethena multisig address in July of last year, representing 2.5% of the total ENA supply.

data.title: Monex: Fed rate cut bets will keep the dollar weak
data.description: Analysts at Monex Europe said in a note that even if the dollar stabilizes before the weekend and light economic data is released on Friday, the dollar is likely to continue to weaken. They said the Federal Reserve appears poised to cut interest rates again on September 17th and begin a steady cycle of policy easing. This should keep the dollar on the defensive for the coming months, they said. Data released Thursday showed a larger-than-expected increase in initial jobless claims last week, while August inflation data came in weaker than expected, with only limited tariff pass-through and no signs of growing price pressures, which has increased market bets on rate cuts. (Jinshi)

data.title: Decentralized multi-chain trading platform NuDEX completes new round of financing, led by MetisDAO
data.description: Decentralized multi-chain trading platform NuDEX has completed a new round of financing, led by MetisDAO Foundation, with participation from Flurry Capital, Waterdrip Capital, YBB Capital, and several strategic investors. The new funds will be used for GOAT chain mainnet upgrades and node network deployment, NuOrbit protocol development and TSS standardization, developer tools and API integration, and developer tools and API integration.

data.title: Bitget has launched U-standard XPIN and UB perpetual contracts
data.description: According to an official announcement, Bitget has launched U-margined XPIN and UB perpetual contracts, both with a maximum leverage of 50x. Contract trading on BOT will also be available simultaneously.

data.description: 1. Magic Eden will launch SparkPad, a token launch platform; 2. Bitcoin treasury company Smarter Web Company plans to seek inclusion in the FTSE 100 index and explore potential acquisitions; 5. data.title: USDC Treasury Burns Over 60 Million Tokens on Ethereum
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Whale Alert has reported that the USDC Treasury recently destroyed 60,876,255 USDC tokens on the Ethereum blockchain. This transaction, which occurred approximately two minutes ago, is valued at around $60,859,332.

data.title: 192,000 SOL redeemed from FTX/Alameda were distributed to 28 addresses
data.description: According to Ember Chain analyst Ember's monitoring, 15 minutes ago, the 192,000 SOL (worth $43.56 million) redeemed from staking by FTX/Alameda today has been distributed and transferred to 28 addresses.

data.title: A suspected Ethena-tagged address transferred 5 million ENA to Binance
data.description: Arkham monitoring data shows that a suspected Ethena-tagged address transferred 5 million ENA to Binance, worth $3.81 million. The address has transferred a total of 44 million ENA to Binance in the past two weeks.

data.title: New ModStealer malware targets crypto wallets across operating systems
data.description: Security firm Mosyle has discovered that the ModStealer malware is targeting cryptocurrency users on macOS, Windows, and Linux systems, stealing wallet private keys and login credentials. The malware remained undetected by major antivirus engines for nearly a month after being uploaded to VirusTotal. ModStealer is being spread through fake job ads, particularly targeting Web 3 developers. Once a user installs the malware package, the program embeds itself in the system's background, stealing clipboard data, taking screenshots, and executing remote commands. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Solana's Strategic Moves May Be Underestimated by the Market
data.description:
According to PANews, the recent developments involving Multicoin Capital, Jump Trading, and Galaxy Digital in the Solana ecosystem may be undervalued by the market. Forward Industries, Inc., a Nasdaq-listed company with a market cap of under $60 million, has been injected with new operational business through PIPE private equity financing, minimizing its previous operational burdens.

Kyle Samani, a prominent advocate for Solana, has personally invested $25 million in the latest DAT initiative, signaling a significant commitment. Multicoin Capital, Jump Trading, and Galaxy Digital have deep ties with Solana. Multicoin has invested over $500 million in the ecosystem, while Jump Trading, a high-frequency trading firm, is involved in developing the Firedancer node and exploring the DFBA mechanism, providing market-making services. Galaxy Digital holds over $1 billion in SOL and has tokenized its stock on Solana, leveraging its global VC network and institutional resources.

The combination of narrative promotion, technological innovation, and resource accessibility forms a powerful triad. Solana's upcoming Alpenglow consensus and Firedancer client node diversity are expected to significantly enhance its performance, with previous mainnet tests achieving over 100,000 TPS and execution speeds reduced to under 150 milliseconds. The DFBA mechanism could potentially lead to groundbreaking new products on the Solana chain. A recent governance proposal, SIMD-228, which was rejected, could have reduced SOL's staking inflation yield, impacting institutional interest in the DAT narrative.

Solana's DAT narrative extends beyond the "micro-strategy" model of Bitcoin, Ethereum, and other altcoins, focusing on the entire ecosystem rather than just the token. The goal is to transition from a pure MEME chain to a new Internet Capital Markets (ICM) narrative, aligning with the trend of TradFi integration promoted by the U.S. crypto-friendly government.

The ICM narrative is expansive enough for Solana, encompassing MEME launchpads, DePIN, PayFi, and HFT Trading, positioning it as a significant player in the evolving financial landscape.

data.title: South Korea's BitPlanet acquires Bitcoin asset management firm SGA Co for $50 million
data.description: According to market news: South Korean institutional Bitcoin company BitPlanet has acquired Bitcoin asset management company SGA Co for $50 million, aiming to become the world's tenth largest Bitcoin asset management company. (BTCtreasuries)

data.title: Bitcoin Hash Rate, Difficulty Hit Record Highs as Miner Supply Spikes
data.description:
Miners’ holdings hit a 90-day high as hash rate and difficulty hit new peaks, priming Bitcoin for a “decisive upward move,” experts argued.
source: https://decrypt.co/339228/bitcoin-hash-rate-difficulty-hit-record-highs-as-miner-supply-spikes

data.title: New ModStealer malware hunts crypto wallets with fake recruiter ads, evades antivirus detection
data.description:
The malware has remained invisible to antivirus engines since first appearing a month ago and is particularly focused on crypto wallets.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/370449/apple-security-firm-mosyle-uncovers-modstealer-cross-platform-malware-crypto-wallets?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
